name: @ds/lint-guard-tests
description: Fixtures-based exit-code harness for the tools/lint/*.ts AI-discipline guards (#286). Each spec spawns the REAL guard via tsx with LINT_FIXTURE_ROOT pointed at a green/red fixture tree and asserts the guard's exit code (0 pass / 1 fail). Runs in CI via `turbo run test` (the `unit` job) — no new CI job.
